databases.title: Search Databases
databases.description: Enable or disable databases and drag to reorder. Databases search first in this order and lists

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: Optional API keys for improved rate limits and access
apiKeys.politeEmailLabel: Polite Pool Email for Crossref, arXiv, and OpenAlex
apiKeys.politeEmailDesc: Your contact email. Sent to Crossref, arXiv, and OpenAlex
apiKeys.pubmedDesc: Optional - increases rate limits (get from NCBI)
apiKeys.baseDesc: Apply for API key via BASE's contact form. Choose "Access BASE's HTTP API" when filling the form

openaire.title: OpenAIRE Connection
openaire.description: Free registration raises the OpenAIRE rate limit from 60 to 7,200 requests/hour.
openaire.tokenPageDesc: Opens OpenAIRE in your browser — log in, then copy the token.
openaire.stepHint: On OpenAIRE: My Account → Personal access token → Get a refresh token → Copy.
openaire.tokenPlaceholder: Paste your OpenAIRE refresh token here
openaire.pasteFailed: Couldn't read from clipboard. Paste manually with Ctrl+V.
openaire.validationError: Couldn't verify the token — double-check you copied the whole refresh token, not the access token.
openaire.autoRenews: Auto-renews. Refresh token expires in {{days}} days.
openaire.expiresSoon: Refresh token expires in {{days}} days — reconnect soon.

search.title: Search Configuration
search.timeoutDesc: Max time per database per source
search.concurrentSourcesDesc: How many sources verify in parallel for one PDF
search.autoScholarDesc: Automatically run Google Scholar scan for non-high sources after verification finishes

notes.title: Export as PDF
notes.annotatedPdfDesc: Save location for annotated PDFs and verification reports
notes.reportBibliographicLabel: Include more info in best match
notes.reportBibliographicDesc: Print the bibliographic details block (volume, pages, publisher, ISSN, etc.) under each best match card in the verification report

cache.title: Cache
cache.folderDesc: Folder where cache files are stored
cache.scholarSessionDesc: Clear cookies and cache for the Scholar webview. Use this if Google shows "Sorry..."

parsing.emptyStateSub: Drag PDFs here, or click Import to select files
parsing.noPdfsReadyToApprove: No PDFs ready to approve yet
parsing.highlightTool: Highlight: drag a box to create
parsing.calloutTool: Callout: drag to draw a box
parsing.autoAnnotateFabricatedTitle: Annotate every source classified as Fabricated and add the callout text above below each
parsing.autoAnnotateCitationTitle: Annotate every source classified as Citation and add the callout text above below each
parsing.autoAnnotateNoneMatched: No matching sources in this category.
parsing.exportTitle: Save a copy of the PDF with notes baked in
parsing.dragToCallout: Drag a box to place a callout.
parsing.selectSourceBox: Select a source box to see details
parsing.selectDocumentActions: Select a document to see actions

verification.title: Verification
verification.approveFirst: Approve sources in Parsing tab first
verification.selectPdf: Select a PDF to verify sources
verification.noSources: No sources found for this PDF
verification.selectSource: Select a source to see details
verification.openGoogleScholar: Open Google Scholar in middle panel
verification.openGoogleSearch: Open Google Search in middle panel
verification.scholarScanNonHigh: Google Scholar scan for non-High sources
verification.scholarCaptchaBanner: CAPTCHA detected — please solve it below. Scan will resume automatically, or close Webview and click Resume.
verification.scholarSolveFirst: Solve the CAPTCHA first, or click Cancel to abort.

cutoff.dragHint: Drag to limit which PDFs run with Verify All

verification.validTagTooltip: Citation metadata matches the discovered record
verification.citationTagTooltip: Real match found but citation details are off

problemDesc.authors: Authors disagree or missing on one side
problemDesc.doi: DOI/arXiv disagrees or missing on one side
problemDesc.year: Year disagrees (>1 yr) or missing on one side
problemDesc.journal: Journal (journal / conference / book) disagrees or missing on one side
problemDesc.title: Title similarity is below 85%
